description:
Add Translation for "Open Now" Status Indicator on English Pages

Implement proper translation handling for the "Open Now" status indicator that is currently displaying untranslated text on English language pages.

Requirements:
- Locate all instances of the "Open Now" status indicator in the codebase
- Ensure the text is wrapped in the translation function/system
- Add or verify the English translation key exists in the language files
- Verify the indicator displays correctly translated text on English pages
- Test that translations work correctly for all supported languages (not just English)
- Check for any similar untranslated status indicators (e.g., "Closed", "Opening Soon") that may need the same fix
title: Fix "Open Now" status indicator translation
